stemHtml: ATC gives you traffic information, 4 NM ahead of your position in opposite direction. What should you do?

options.a: Start a turn at a normal rate.
options.b: Start climbing immediately to a higher level.
options.c: Start a turn with max bank angle and push back the sidestick to make the turn even tighter.
options.d: Monitor your ND throughout the TA, and follow the TCAS RA if triggered.
